Logistics DE GmbH

Your partner for international freight and warehousing in Hamburg

Our Services

  • International freight forwarding
  • Warehousing and distribution
  • Customs clearance
  • Last-mile delivery across Europe

About Us

Logistics DE is a mid-sized logistics company based in Hamburg, Germany. We serve over 200 SME clients with end-to-end supply chain solutions. Founded in 2010, our team of 85 specialists handles road, sea, and air freight.

Contact
